About Stonewall Kitchen

We got our start in 1991, selling handmade jams and jellies at local farmers’ markets, fairs and festivals. A passion for innovative recipes and flavors soon led us to expand to sauces, condiments, mustards, baking mixes, and more—all made with the same high-quality ingredients and painstaking attention to detail. Today, our products are sold in more than 6,000 locations both nationwide and internationally, and through our company stores!
